name: Fruit or Berry Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Water or juice from fruit/berries
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
Filling:
Combine sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan. Add water and blend well. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until it thickens. Add lemon juice and fruit/berries. Pour into baking dish and add topping below.
Topping:
Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into a mixing bowl. Add milk and butter, beating until smooth. Spoon or pour over filling in baking dish. Sprinkle with mixture of sugar and nutmeg.
Bake for 40 to 45 minutes.
